scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.zip: tar -acf InsideIIM_TakeHomeAssignment.zip --exclude="node_modules" --exclude="dist" --exclude=".vercel" --exclude=".git" client server scripts transcripts package.json package-lock.json README.md .gitignore
